scripts.util:format:shell: shfmt -w -i 4 -ci scripts/*.sh scripts/lib/*.sh shell/zsh/functions/*.sh terminal/bin/* macos/.macos
scripts.util:lint:shell: shellcheck scripts/*.sh scripts/lib/*.sh shell/zsh/functions/*.sh terminal/bin/* macos/.macos
scripts.util:lint:zsh: zsh -n shell/zsh/zshrc shell/zsh/zprofile shell/zsh/zshrc.local.example shell/zsh/functions/update.sh shell/zsh/functions/agent-browser.sh
scripts.util:check: STATUS=0; bun run util:format || STATUS=1; bun run util:format:shell || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint:shell || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint:zsh || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint:fish || STATUS=1; exit $STATUS
